patch.value: GH-553: remove unnecessary spread in history read ordering assertion
Resolve the remaining CodeFactor unnecessary-spread finding in tests/unit/sdk/history-read-primitives.spec.ts without weakening deterministic ordering coverage.
The redundant spread is removed, the history-read focused suite passes, and CodeFactor reports the finding resolved.

value.author: codex-gpt5

patch.value: GH-553/GH-584: CodeFactor unnecessary-spread findings — restructure flagged spread sites (class owner)

message: Broadened into the CodeFactor unnecessary-spread class owner; GH-584 (sdk/graph/run.ts:684 conditional spread) mapped here

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Class broadened 2026-07-18: this item now owns ALL CodeFactor "unnecessary spread" findings (GH-553 test-side history read assertion + NEW GH-584 sdk/graph/run.ts:684). The GH-584 site is the exactOptionalPropertyTypes conditional-spread idiom `...(x === undefined ? {} : { kinds: x })` in runGraphCommunities — fix by building the options object without spread (explicit conditional assignment or a small buildOptions helper), preserving exact-optional typing. Sweep the graph run.ts family for sibling instances of the same idiom at fix time. Never file per-site spread point patches — extend this item.
